the first one? im so stuck honestly

milestone.description: Write a Python program that uses a for loop to print the numbers 0 to 4

context.text: Try writing the loop yourself now.
Close! You are missing one small symbol after the parentheses. Which one?

suggestions.tutorReply: Great question! A boolean condition is an expression that is either True or False — like score >= 90. If score is exactly 90, what does score >= 90 evaluate to?

milestone.description: Evaluate boolean comparisons like score >= 90 for concrete scores

context.text: If score is 90, what does score >= 90 evaluate to?
True, because 90 is equal to 90 and >= includes equal
